params.SpellDescription: Goad all creatures your opponents control. (Until your next turn, those creatures attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Goad all creatures your opponents control. (Until your next turn, those creatures attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.)

params.Description: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each opponent you attacked this turn.
